2026-06-02IRCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActAppointment of a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Montréal Regional Office)Appointment of Roxane Vachon of Montréal, Quebec, to be a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Montréal Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Montréal Regional Office)
precis: Appointment of Roxane Vachon of Montréal, Quebec, to be a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Montréal Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years.
